apps.name: Apps
apps.description: Building and shipping Products on the Polkadot platform, from identity setup and local development through to deployment and discovery.

basics.name: Basics
basics.description: Polkadot overview, core concepts, and getting started guides for new developers.

smart_contracts.name: Smart Contracts
smart_contracts.description: Developing and deploying smart contracts on Polkadot Hub using Solidity, EVM, PolkaVM, and tools like Hardhat and Foundry.

parachains.name: Parachains
parachains.description: Building and deploying parachains with the Polkadot SDK, including runtime development, pallets, and coretime.

chain_interactions.name: Chain Interactions
chain_interactions.description: How to query on-chain data, send transactions, communicate across chains, and manage tokens and accounts on Polkadot-based chains.

interoperability.name: Interoperability
interoperability.description: Cross-chain communication via XCM, asset transfers, HRMP channels, and bridging to external networks.

infrastructure.name: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Running validators, collators, and RPC nodes, plus staking mechanics and key management.

polkadot_protocol.name: Polkadot Protocol
polkadot_protocol.description: Protocol internals covering consensus, coretime, block production, cryptography, and chain architecture.

tooling.name: Tooling
tooling.description: Developer SDKs and tools including PAPI, Polkadot.js, subxt, light clients, and testing frameworks.

reference.name: Reference
reference.description: Glossary, governance structures, origin tracks, and technical specifications.
